title: Hypertension follow-up
source_review_basis: full authoritative documents inspected and archived; item-level retain/rewrite/remove/add comparisons recorded

assessment.text: Specifies office, repeated home, and ambulatory blood-pressure assessment and hypertension staging.

source.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Virtual Management of Hypertension – 27
source.population: Adults with suspected or established hypertension.
source.setting: Telehealth services in DHA-licensed health facilities.
source.exclusions: Direct for Dubai telehealth hypertension assessment and follow-up; partial for a general setting-agnostic follow-up workflow.
source.evidence_paraphrase: Defines DHA-licensed telehealth hypertension scope and emergency and controlled-medication exclusions.

assessment.text: Lists severe blood pressure, confusion, visual changes, chest pain, breathlessness, neurological symptoms, severe headache, and specialist referral criteria.
